explanations.4: getenv('WEBSITE') reads an environment variable (a configuration value stored outside the code) that contains the base URL of the website being tested.
explanations.20: The ->click('Blog') method simulates a user clicking on an element with the text 'Blog' on the page.
explanations.37: The ->click('.DocSearch-Button') targets an element using a CSS class selector (the dot means 'class'), similar to how you'd select it in CSS.
explanations.38: The ->type() method simulates a user typing text into a specific input field identified by the CSS selector '.DocSearch-Input'.
